name: signal-onboard
description: One-time per product: run the Onboarding agent (Team Charter §1) to emit Soul Document, product-Constitution draft, Surface Inventory, permanently-T3 list, and seed Belief

name: signal-init
description: Bootstrap a new product repo with SignalOS governance files

name: signal-pre-wave
description: Run the pre-wave ceremony: Belief draft, Expectation Map, Plan

name: signal-plan
description: Activate the Plan agent to produce PLAN.md + failing tests from a signed Expectation Map

name: signal-build
description: Activate Build subagents on declared tasks with Trust Tier enforcement

name: signal-review
description: Run Stage-1 automated review, then Stage-2 manual QA

name: signal-ship
description: Execute merge (PE) then hand off to DevOps for deploy, with SoD enforcement

name: signal-observe
description: Post-release signal monitoring — load belief context, read live metrics, check staleness, compare actual vs target, write observation evidence, route to debrief

name: signal-debrief
description: Run Phase-8: reconcile, retro, retrospective-analyze, Constitution-delta

name: signal-wave-review
description: Run the Wave Review ceremony with Observability agent output

name: signal-pause
description: Opt-in step-pause controller: list paused steps, resume (release) a paused step, or abort one. Default is no pause — a step only pauses if PLAN declared `pause: true`.

name: signalos-session
description: Python CLI surface for the session journal: list / show / resume / archive. Calls cli/signalos session ...

name: harness-call
description: Execute a PLAN step headlessly via the 8th emitter. Emits the same preamble / journal / metrics events as the 7 editor emitters.

name: signalos-install
description: Install a cosign-signed plugin tarball. Refuses unsigned or tier-demoted plugins. Writes an AUDIT_TRAIL.jsonl entry on success.

name: signalos-publish
description: Sign and register a plugin tarball for distribution. Requires a cosign key.

name: signalos-verify
description: Re-verify the cosign signature of an installed plugin. Used by the post-retro hook to detect tampering.

name: context-expand
description: Expand a compressed context turn back to its verbatim form from the session journal. Disk-truth is never compressed (AMD-CORE-005 invariant).

name: signalos-orchestrate
description: Parallel wave orchestrator: create git worktrees for a Wave's tasks, dispatch them concurrently via the headless harness, then reconcile and retire. AMD-CORE-008.

name: signalos-status
description: Render the Wave status card: gates G0-G5, active tasks with tier and status, belief statement, scale track, and next blocking action. AMD-CORE-008.

name: intent
description: Route a free-form phrase to the matching signalos command (W3.3, AMD-CORE-016). Pure stdlib — no LLM call on the routing path.

name: plan-schema
description: Machine-readable task schema commands: render PLAN.md, validate PLAN.tasks.yaml, list tasks (W3.4, AMD-CORE-017).

name: health
description: System health check: git, Python runtime, jq, wiring guard, daemon heartbeat. Exits 0/1/2 (OK/DEGRADED/DOWN). (W3.5, AMD-CORE-018).

name: diagnose
description: Runtime diagnostic snapshot: daemon state, audit trail, worktrees, gate status, pending T2 items. (W3.5, AMD-CORE-018).

name: validate-cmd
description: Run the full validator suite (HALT/BLOCK_MERGE/WARN tiers) or a single named validator. (W3.5, AMD-CORE-018).

name: signal-qa
description: Gating QA run: discovers YAML scenarios, executes via SBrowser, runs regression suite, emits evidence JSON, and fills QUALITY_CHECK.md for Gate 5 entry. (W7, AMD-CORE-028).

name: signal-qa-only
description: Non-gating QA run: executes scenarios and regressions, emits evidence JSON with gating:false. Does not modify QUALITY_CHECK.md. (W7, AMD-CORE-028).

name: signal-pre-design
description: W8 Design Pipeline: scoping ceremony — 4 modes, 6 forcing questions, outputs PO_BRIEF.md

name: signal-design
description: W8 Design Pipeline: variant generation (explore), approval, and taste iteration

name: signal-design-review
description: W8 Design Pipeline: 8-dimension rubric review of a design variant

name: signal-design-html
description: W8 Design Pipeline: promote approved variant to production HTML/JSX/Svelte

name: signalos-brain
description: Knowledge Brain — put/search/list/prune/export/upgrade entries (W9, AMD-CORE-030)

name: signal-learn
description: Human-facing brain review, search, prune, and export (W9, AMD-CORE-030)

name: signal-cso
description: Security Chief Officer — OWASP+STRIDE threat model, canary tokens, injection scan (W10, AMD-CORE-031).

name: signal-autoplan
description: Auto-generate PLAN task list from a feature description (W11, AMD-CORE-032).

name: signal-context-restore
description: Checkpoint save/restore and doc drift detection (W11, AMD-CORE-032).

name: signal-setup-deploy
description: Set up a deployment record for a wave and stage (W12, AMD-CORE-033).

name: signal-land-deploy
description: Mark a deployment as landed (W12, AMD-CORE-033).

name: signal-canary-deploy
description: Post-deploy canary check: verify deploy records exist for a wave (W12, AMD-CORE-033).

name: signal-benchmark
description: Record Core Web Vitals benchmark: LCP, INP, CLS, TTFB, weight (W12, AMD-CORE-033).

name: signal-devex-plan
description: Plan DevEx work in three modes: EXPANSION, POLISH, TRIAGE (W13, AMD-CORE-034).

name: signal-devex
description: Record a DevEx metric — TTHW (Time To Hello World) or custom (W13, AMD-CORE-034).

name: signal-retro-global
description: Cross-product retrospective: query brain index for insights across waves (W13, AMD-CORE-034).

name: signal-careful
description: Enable/disable/check careful mode — extra caution flag for high-risk operations (W14, AMD-CORE-035).

name: signal-freeze
description: Lock a directory against writes by creating a freeze record (W14, AMD-CORE-035).

name: signal-guard
description: Check if a directory is frozen — gate that blocks writes when frozen (W14, AMD-CORE-035).

name: signal-unfreeze
description: Remove a directory freeze — allow writes again (W14, AMD-CORE-035).

name: signal-second-opinion
description: Request independent cross-model review on a plan, diff, or decision (W15, AMD-CORE-036).

name: signal-investigate
description: Iron-law systematic debugging protocol: reproduce → log → regression → fix (W15, AMD-CORE-036).

name: signal-discovery
description: Run a structured stakeholder interview and emit a Discovery Brief — the prerequisite artifact for /signal-onboard (W16, AMD-CORE-037).
